sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n108499" key="u(poka/rpios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑποκάρπιος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n108499.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">under the wrist,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἀρτηρία</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4000.tlg001:1:13" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aristaenet.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.13</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
